channel.title: Projects on Amy Lin
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Amy Lin

item.title: Addressing Disproportionate Gun Possession Charges among Young Black Men in Englewood
item.description: An analytical pipeline in R synthesizing Cook County and Chicago datasets to expose trends in felony review and bond outcomes.

item.title: Identifying Chicago Neighborhoods at Risk of Gentrification
item.description: A spatial analysis model using a composite indexing framework to identify Chicago census tracts at risk of housing displacement.

item.title: Nonprofit Website Redesign
item.description: A UX design project focused on optimizing accessibility and navigation of a website with domestic violence survivor resources.

item.title: Project All Access Livable Housing
item.description: An end-to-end data application in Python analyzing spatio-temporal housing and homelessness trends in San Francisco.
